name: Organization
description: JSON Structure description of the Gitea Organization entity.

avatar_url.description: The URL of the organization's avatar

email.description: The email address of the organization

full_name.description: The full display name of the organization

id.description: The unique identifier of the organization

repo_admin_change_team_access.description: Whether repository administrators can change team access

visibility.description: The visibility level of the organization (public, limited, private)

website.description: The website URL of the organization
